title: Homalobus tweedyi
taxonomy: Homalobus tweedyi is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Homalobus tweedyi places it within the genus Homalobus. Within the family Rubiaceae, Homalobus tweedyi belongs to the tribe Spermacoceae. The classification of this species continues to be refined as new research and discoveries are made.
